description: Fiscal document, in Arabic script. Large format with 16 lines preserved, marginal notes, and crossings out. The document is an internal fiscal Fatimid accounting document mentioning military spending from the year 500/1106-7. There are large sums of money and iqṭāʿāt. Mentions an official of al-Afḍal by the name Zahr al-Dawla Bandūd al-Afḍalī. (See al-Maqrīzī, Ittiʿāẓ, III, 34).
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
